notSaveChanges: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

no_results.subtext: Change your search to contain less filters or keywords

deleteInfo.ariaLabel: How to delete a production group
deleteInfo.tooltip: To delete a production group, first select that group in the filters and then select every production from it. Once the full group is selected, the delete button will appear.

dialog.title: Create a production group
dialog.description: Group the selected productions under a shared title so visitors can use them as a filter in the archive.
dialog.publicLabel: Show this group in the public archive filters
dialog.publicHint: When enabled, visitors can use this production group as a filter in the archive.

deleteDialog.title: Delete production group
deleteDialog.description: You are about to remove "{{title}}" from the archive filters.
deleteDialog.warning: The productions themselves stay available in the archive. This action cannot be undone.

messages.titleRequired: A production group title is required.
messages.noProductionsSelected: Select at least one production before creating a production group.
messages.createFailed: Could not create the production group.
messages.deleteFailed: Could not delete the production group.

accessDenied.title: You do not have access to the production creation page.
accessDenied.description: This section requires the archive:create permission. Contact an administrator if you need access to create productions.

fallback.unknownProduction: Information in this language is not available.
fallback.noTeaser: No teaser available for this production.
fallback.noDescription: No additional description is available for this production.
fallback.noInfo: No extra information is available for this production.
fallback.noEvents: No events recorded for this production.
fallback.noLinkedBlogs: No blogs linked to this production.

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this production info? This action cannot be undone.
delete.error: Error: Each production should have info in at least one language.

home.title: Windows to the Past
home.description: VIERNULVIER has always been a beacon of culture in Ghent. Our digital archive preserves these fragments of time — from the roar of underground concerts to the quiet poetry of experimental theatre.

history.title: The Echoes of the Building
history.heroAlt: A black-and-white photo of the inauguration of the Vooruit Festivities Hall in 1914, with a large crowd in front of the entrance.
history.error: The history timeline could not be fetched from the server.

messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this entry?

empty.title: No history entries found
empty.description: No history-data has been found yet...

placeholders.title: Give a short title for this moment
placeholders.content: Tell the story of this moment in history

noResults.subtext: Change your search to contain less keywords

card.no_prods: No productions are linked to this blog

media.title: Media
media.dropMedia: Drag and drop images and/or videos or
media.acceptedFileFormats: PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF - MP4, WEBM, MOV - max 10 MB

accessDenied.title: You do not have access to blog creation
accessDenied.description: This section requires the blogs:create permission. Contact an administrator if you need to create blogs.

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this blog? This action cannot be undone.
delete.error: Failed to delete the blog. Please try again.

detail.title: Blog
detail.comingSoon: This blog page is coming soon.

login.formDescription: Enter your username and password to start an authenticated session.

errors.invalidCredentials: The provided username or password is incorrect.
errors.generic: We could not sign you in right now. Please try again.

users.title: User management
users.description: Review active accounts and make lightweight account changes without leaving the overview.

form.passwordCreateHint: New users need a password before the account can be created.
form.passwordEditHint: Leave the password blank to keep the current password unchanged.
form.rolesHint: Choose any roles that should be assigned as soon as the account is created.
form.rolesEditHint: Choose the roles that should remain assigned to this account.
form.rolesEmptyHint: No roles exist yet. Create a role first if this account needs one immediately.

messages.loadFailed: We could not load the user administration data right now.
messages.createFailed: We could not create the user right now.
messages.updateFailed: We could not update the user right now.
messages.deleteFailed: We could not delete the user right now.
messages.sessionRefreshFailed: The user was updated, but we could not refresh the active session.

create.title: Add user
create.description: Create an account with a username, password, and any initial roles.

edit.title: Edit user
edit.description: Update the account details or assigned roles for this user.

delete.title: Delete user
delete.description: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the account "{{username}}"? This action cannot be undone.

empty.title: No users found
empty.description: Once accounts are created, they will appear here with their assigned roles and derived permissions.

accessDenied.title: You do not have access to user management
accessDenied.description: This section requires the users:read permission. Contact an administrator if you need access to manage accounts.

form.permissionsHint: Select the permissions that should be granted as soon as this role is created.
form.permissionsEditHint: Select the permissions that should remain assigned to this role.
form.permissionsEmptyHint: No permissions are available right now.

messages.loadFailed: We could not load roles right now.
messages.permissionsLoadFailed: We could not load available permissions right now.
messages.createFailed: We could not create the role right now.
messages.updateFailed: We could not update the role right now.
messages.deleteFailed: We could not delete the role right now.

create.title: Add role
create.description: Create a new role and assign its permissions immediately.

edit.title: Edit role
edit.description: Update this role and keep its assigned permissions in sync.

delete.title: Delete role
delete.description: Delete the role {{roleName}}? This is only possible when no users are assigned to it.

empty.title: No roles found
empty.description: Once roles are created they will appear here with their assigned permissions.

notFound.title: 404 - Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist. It might have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable.
notFound.quote: Minder is sometimes meer, but sometimes not
